description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On October 14, 2025 at 3:51 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Mountain View, California was in a 
collision involving a passenger car on Logue Avenue at E. Middlefield Road.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling southwestbound on Logue Avenue in the dedicated right turn lane when it stopped for a red light at the 
intersection with E. Middlefield Road. The Waymo AV initiated the right turn and then came to a stop again before entering E. Middlefield 
Road. A passenger car that was making a right turn directly behind the Waymo AV continued forward and the front of the passenger car 
made contact with the rear of the stationary Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in 
autonomous mode. Both vehicles sustained damage. 
 
Print
Clear Form
